nodes.name: 金岛
nodes.summary: 金岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Tasmanian boobook、Black-headed honeyeater、Yellow wattlebird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Black-headed honeyeater
nodes.summary: Black-headed honeyeater（Black-headed honeyeater，学名 Melithreptus affinis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于金岛、弗诺群岛。

nodes.name: 弗诺群岛
nodes.summary: 弗诺群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-headed honeyeater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-headed honeyeater is endemic to Tasmania as well as King Island and the Furneaux Group, where it inhabits wet and dry sclerophyll forests, as well as scrub and heathland, and subalpine habitats to an altitude of 1200 m (4000 ft)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-headed honeyeater is endemic to Tasmania as well as King Island and the Furneaux Group, where it inhabits wet and dry sclerophyll forests, as well as scrub and heathland, and subalpine habitats to an altitude of 1200 m (4000 ft)
